title: Design data guideline document
description: Layer 1 structural schema for a standalone foundation/guideline document — a non-component Spectrum guidance page such as color, typography, motion, spacing, principles, or app-frame. Body prose is modeled as document blocks. See spec/guideline-format.md.

$id.description: Canonical identifier for this guideline document.

name.description: Machine identifier (kebab-case slug). Matches the filename (e.g. 'colors', 'app-frame-overview').

category.description: High-level category classifying the guideline within the guidance corpus.

sourceUrl.description: Canonical URL of the upstream source page (e.g. 'https://s2.spectrum.corp.adobe.com/page/colors/').

lastUpdated.description: ISO 8601 date of the most recent source-page update (e.g. '2026-02-02').

status.description: Publication status of this guideline (e.g. 'published'). Left as an open string — not an enum — to accommodate future status values without a schema change.

tags.description: Free-form tags for discovery and filtering.

related.description: Related entities. A reference MAY target a component (by name) or another guideline document (by name). Targets are not required to resolve at Layer 1; SPEC-046 advisorily warns on dangling references.

documentBlocks.description: Typed prose blocks that form the body of this guideline. See spec/document-blocks.md (Phase 9).

ref.description: kebab-case name of the related component or guideline.

kind.description: Optional hint for what 'ref' targets. When omitted, tooling resolves against both catalogs.
